redemptionType: Secondary-market trading only; no verified asset redemption for TRU
liquidityNotes: TRU remains transferable and traded on secondary markets according to CoinGecko, with 24h volume reported around $1.5m on 2026-06-10. However, the token is a legacy governance/protocol token in a TrueFi-to-Brila transition, not a verified redeemable claim on private-credit assets. DeFiLlama showed low protocol TVL around $21.7k, while active loans were displayed separately and not included in default TVL. Liquidity score is therefore conservative: secondary-market token liquidity exists, but asset-level redemption and institutional exit mechanics are not verified.

_meta.notes: Liquidity score reflects weak institutional liquidity/redemption quality despite observable secondary-market volume. Refresh exchange markets, DEX liquidity, slippage, migration status, and any BRLA access-portal implications before publication.
